item.title: Claude Code「被开源」，隐藏功能「赛博宠物」和永久记忆 AI 提前曝光
item.guid: Claude-Code「被开源」，隐藏功能「赛博宠物」和永久记忆-AI-提前曝光
item.description:
Yesterday afternoon, developer Chaofan Shou posted on X, directly releasing the complete source code package for Anthropic's command-line tool, Claude Code, which sparked widespread attention in the developer community. The post garnered over 12 million views within hours. 昨天下午，开发者 Chaofan Shou 在 X 发文，直接放出了 Anthropic 旗下命令行工具 Claude Code 的完整源码压缩包，引发开发者社区广泛关注。该帖子数小时内浏览量突破 1200 万次。

The incident began when Anthropic forgot to delete .map files (Source Map) when publishing packages to the npm public registry. These files are used to map compressed and obfuscated production code back to the original source code for local debugging, but deleting them during official release is a basic operation. 事件起因是 Anthropic 在向 npm 公共镜像库发包时，忘记删除 .map 文件（Source Map）。这类文件的作用是将压缩、混淆后的生产代码映射回原始源码，方便本地调试，但在正式发布时将其删除是基本操作。

It was this oversight that led to nearly 2,000 files and over 500,000 lines of TypeScript code being publicly exposed online. 正是这一失误，导致近 2000 份文件、超过 50 万行 TypeScript 代码在网上公开裸露。

Among the leaked source code, developers uncovered several unreleased features. The most discussed project is codenamed BUDDY — a "cyber pet" system planned to be built into the terminal. 在已泄露的源码中，开发者们扒出了多个尚未发布的功能。讨论度最高的是代号 BUDDY 的项目——一个计划内置于终端的 「赛博宠物」 系统。

Pets are generated based on the user ID's hash value, making each one unique. There are 18 preset biological forms, including ducks, dragons, capybaras, ghosts, etc., and a rarity system ranging from "Common" to "1% Legendary," as well as five dynamic stats: DEBUGGING, PATIENCE, CHAOS, WISDOM, and SNARK. 宠物根据用户 ID 的哈希值生成，每人独一无二，预设了 18 种生物形态，包含鸭子、龙、水豚、幽灵等，并设有从「普通」到「1% 传奇」的稀有度体系，以及五项动态数值：DEBUGGING（调试力）、PATIENCE（耐心）、CHAOS（混沌）、WISDOM（智慧）和 SNARK（阴阳怪气值）。

The source code shows that the feature was originally planned as an Easter egg warm-up from April 1st to 7th, with internal beta testing opening to Anthropic employees in May. 源码显示，该功能原计划于 4 月 1 日至 7 日作为彩蛋预热，5 月份向 Anthropic 内部员工开放内测。

Another highly anticipated feature is the "always-on" AI assistant codenamed KAIROS. This assistant can maintain continuous memory across sessions, storing user work habits and project context in a private directory, and has the authority to proactively initiate tasks. 另一个备受关注的功能是代号 KAIROS 的「永远在线」AI 助手。 该助手能够跨会话保持持续记忆，将用户的工作习惯和项目背景存储在私密目录中，并有权限主动发起任务。

Notably, the source code also includes a mechanism called "Nightly Dreaming" — automatically starting background processes at night to review the day's interactions, remove redundant information, and consolidate core content into long-term memory to prevent context logs from infinitely expanding. 值得注意的是，源码中还包含一个名为「Nightly Dreaming（夜间做梦）」的机制——在夜间自动启动后台进程，回溯当天交互内容，剔除冗余信息，将核心内容沉淀为长期记忆，以防止上下文日志无限膨胀。

🔗 Related Reading: No Joke, Claude Code Source Code Leaked, 500,000 Lines of Code Exposed 🔗 相关阅读： 不开玩笑，Claude Code源码泄露，50万行代码被扒光

item.title: 软银、英伟达领投，OpenAI 史上最大融资落地
item.guid: 软银、英伟达领投，OpenAI-史上最大融资落地
item.description:
OpenAI announced early this morning the completion of a new round of financing, with a funding size of $122 billion, bringing the company's valuation to $852 billion after the financing. OpenAI 今日凌晨宣布完成新一轮融资，融资规模达 1220 亿美元，融资完成后公司估值为 8520 亿美元。

This round of financing was co-led by Amazon, NVIDIA, and SoftBank, with SoftBank co-leading alongside a16z, D. E. Shaw Ventures, MGX, TPG, and accounts under T. Rowe Price. Microsoft, as a long-term partner, continued to participate as a follow-on investor. 本轮融资由亚马逊、英伟达和软银共同领投，其中软银与 a16z、D. E. Shaw Ventures、MGX、TPG 以及 T. Rowe Price 旗下账户联合领投。微软作为长期合作伙伴继续参与跟投。

Notably, OpenAI opened participation channels to individual investors for the first time, raising over $3 billion through banking channels. 值得关注的是，OpenAI 此次首次向个人投资者开放参与渠道，通过银行渠道募集超过 30 亿美元。

Regarding the use of funds, OpenAI stated that it will continue to invest heavily in AI chip procurement, data center construction, and recruitment of top talent. 在资金用途方面，OpenAI 表示将继续大规模投入 AI 芯片采购、数据中心建设及顶尖人才招募。

In terms of business data, OpenAI disclosed that ChatGPT currently has nearly 900 million weekly active users, over 50 million paid subscribers, and the number of monthly active users is expected to soon exceed 1 billion. The company's monthly revenue has reached $2 billion, with enterprise business accounting for over 40% of total revenue. 在业务数据方面，OpenAI 披露 ChatGPT 目前每周活跃用户接近 9 亿，付费订阅用户超过 5000 万，月活跃用户数量预计即将突破 10 亿。公司月收入已达 20 亿美元，企业业务占总收入比例超过 40%。

The API platform processes over 15 billion tokens per minute, and Codex has over 2 million weekly active users, growing 5x in the past three months with a month-over-month growth rate exceeding 70%. API 平台每分钟处理 token 数量超过 150 亿，Codex 每周活跃用户超过 200 万，过去三个月增长 5 倍，月环比增速超过 70%。

🔗 Related Reading: Just Now, OpenAI Set the Largest Funding Record in History, Valuation Nearing Trillion 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，OpenAI 创下史上最大融资纪录，估值逼近万亿

item.title: 苹果回应国行 AI 意外上线：软件问题，上线时间待审批
item.guid: 苹果回应国行-AI-意外上线：软件问题，上线时间待审批
item.description:
Yesterday, the "Apple Intelligence & Siri" option briefly appeared on the settings page of Chinese iPhones, sparking widespread discussion. However, this entry was quickly removed afterward, and the functionality for users who had already downloaded the model was also revoked. 昨天，国行 iPhone 设置页面短暂出现「Apple 智能与 Siri」选项，引发热议。不过，该入口随后被迅速移除，已下载模型的用户功能也一并被收回。

It is understood that this push was due to a software issue, where Chinese iPhones and iPads were briefly able to download and enable device-side Apple Intelligence applicable to other regions. This issue has been quickly fixed by Apple. 据了解，本次推送是由于软件问题，国行 iPhone 和 iPad 曾短暂可以下载其他地区适用的设备端 Apple 智能并启用该功能。该问题已被苹果迅速修复。

Apple Intelligence has not yet been launched on Chinese devices, and its launch time depends on regulatory approval. Apple 智能尚未在国行设备推出，推出时间依监管部门审批情况而定。

item.title: 曝新版 Siri 将支持一句话同时完成多个指令
item.guid: 曝新版-Siri-将支持一句话同时完成多个指令
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple is testing a new Siri feature that allows users to handle multiple requests simultaneously in a single command. 据彭博社报道，苹果正在测试一项新的 Siri 功能，允许用户在单次指令中同时处理多个请求。

This feature will be part of iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27, allowing users to issue multiple commands to Siri in one sentence, such as simultaneously checking the weather, creating a calendar event, and sending a message. 这项功能将作为 iOS 27、iPadOS 27 和 macOS 27 的组成部分，用户可以在一句话中向 Siri 发出多项指令，如同时查询天气、创建日历事项并发送一条消息。

Apple's goal for this transformation is to build it into an intelligent assistant capable of understanding contextual information (including user's personal information and screen content). 苹果此次改造的目标，是将其打造为一款能够理解上下文信息（包括用户的个人信息与屏幕内容）的智能助手。

In addition, Apple is exploring upgrading the system keyboard to expand auto-correction features and offer alternative word suggestions, similar to Grammarly. However, whether this feature will ultimately be released is not yet confirmed. Apple recently updated its keyboard algorithm to improve the "missing word" issue. 此外，苹果还在探索升级系统键盘，通过类似 Grammarly 的方式扩展自动更正功能，提供替代词建议。不过该功能是否最终发布尚未确定。苹果近日已对键盘算法进行了更新，以改善「缺字」问题。

Apple is expected to officially release the new version of Siri and related Apple Intelligence features at the Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) on June 8th local time. 苹果预计将于当地时间 6 月 8 日的全球开发者大会（WWDC）上正式发布新版 Siri 及 Apple Intelligence 的相关功能。

item.title: 微信上线压缩包免解压预览功能
item.guid: 微信上线压缩包免解压预览功能
item.description:
Yesterday, WeChat officially announced the launch of a "preview" feature for compressed packages. Now, without needing to download or decompress, you can click on a compressed package and select "Preview" to directly view its content, without occupying local storage space. 昨天，微信官宣上线压缩包「预览」功能，现在无需下载或解压，点击压缩包后选择「预览」即可直接查看其中内容，不占用本地存储空间。

In viewing mode, the preview interface provides a view switching button in the upper right corner, supporting free switching between list and image views, making it convenient for users to quickly browse core content such as images within the compressed package. 在查看模式上，预览界面右上角提供视图切换按钮，支持在列表与图片视图之间自由切换，方便用户快速浏览压缩包内的图片等核心内容。

Furthermore, users can select single or multiple files in preview mode and directly perform save, forward, or favorite operations, without needing to decompress and download the entire compressed package. 此外，用户还可以在预览状态下选择单个或多个文件，直接执行保存、转发或收藏操作，无需将整个压缩包全部解压下载。

item.title: DeepSeek 又崩了，这次火速修复
item.guid: DeepSeek-又崩了，这次火速修复
item.description:
Yesterday around 17:30, DeepSeek once again experienced "web/API performance anomalies," with many users reporting the platform was in a "server busy" state. The official team immediately launched an investigation. As of 18:05, DeepSeek's service status page indicated the issue had been resolved and services were back to normal. 昨天 17:30 左右，DeepSeek 再度出现「网页/API 性能异常」，大量用户反映平台处于「服务器繁忙」状态，官方随即展开调查。截至 18:05，DeepSeek 服务状态页面显示问题已排除，服务恢复正常。

It is worth noting that this outage occurred less than three days after the last major downtime. On March 29th at 21:35, DeepSeek's web and app versions simultaneously experienced issues where new conversations could not be initiated and existing conversations frequently disconnected. The outage lasted nearly 12 hours, only being officially fixed at 10:33 the following morning, setting a record for the longest interruption since the platform's launch. 值得注意的是，本次故障距上一次大规模宕机不足三天。3 月 29 日 21:35，DeepSeek 网页端和 App 同时出现无法发起新对话、已有对话频繁中断的情况，故障持续近 12 小时，直至次日上午 10:33 才正式修复，创下该平台上线以来最长中断纪录。

item.title: 中兴通讯：正推进新一代豆包 AI 手机
item.guid: 中兴通讯：正推进新一代豆包-AI-手机
item.description: According to Jiemian News, ZTE disclosed yesterday at its 2025 annual performance briefing that the company is deepening cooperation with ecosystem partners such as ByteDance to jointly advance the R&D and launch of the new generation Doubao AI phone. It is expected to be released in the mid-to-late second quarter of this year, and related certification work is currently underway. 据界面新闻报道，中兴通讯昨日在 2025 年度业绩说明会上披露，公司正与字节跳动等生态伙伴深化合作，共同推进新一代豆包 AI 手机的研发与落地，预计将于今年第二季度中晚期发布，目前正推进相关认证工作。

item.title: Meta 推行「AI 转型周」，全员用 Claude Code 搞黑客马拉松
item.guid: Meta-推行「AI-转型周」，全员用-Claude-Code-搞黑客马拉松
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Meta is internally implementing an intensive AI training program called "AI Transformation Week," encouraging all employees to actively experiment with AI tools and build practical projects using Claude Code. 据《商业内幕》报道，Meta 正在内部推行名为「AI 转型周」（AI Transformation Week）的密集 AI 培训计划，鼓励全体员工积极尝试 AI 工具，并借助 Claude Code 构建实际项目。

In March this year, several teams successively held AI Week events, covering hackathons, internal tool demonstrations, and hands-on experience with AI agents. 今年 3 月，多个团队相继举办了 AI 周活动，内容涵盖黑客马拉松、内部工具演示以及 AI 智能体（Agent）的实操体验。

It is reported that Meta has set differentiated AI tool adoption goals for each team and is implementing an "AI-native" reorganization within its Reality Labs division — redefining employees as "AI builders" and restructuring team units into AI-native "Pods." 据悉，Meta 已为各团队设定了差异化的 AI 工具采用目标，并在旗下 Reality Labs 部门推行「AI 原生」重组——将员工重新定义为「AI 构建者」，并以 AI 原生「小组」（Pod）为单位重新编排团队结构。

Last Tuesday, Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth announced he would personally lead the company's internal AI application promotion efforts, a project internally known as "AI for Work." Bosworth posted on the X platform, stating: "These tools promise to empower every employee to do their work more effectively." 上周二，Meta 首席技术官 Andrew Bosworth 宣布将亲自主导公司内部 AI 应用推广工作，该项目在内部被称为「AI for Work」。Bosworth 在 X 平台发文表示：「这些工具有望赋予每位员工更强大的能力去完成工作。」

It is worth noting that concurrently with some employees participating in AI training, Meta carried out layoffs affecting hundreds of people in Reality Labs and other departments. 值得注意的是，就在部分员工参加 AI 培训的同期，Meta 对 Reality Labs 及其他部门进行了数百人规模的裁员。

item.title: 真我全面接入 OPPO 售后体系
item.guid: 真我全面接入-OPPO-售后体系
item.description:
Yesterday, realme announced that starting today, realme will fully integrate into OPPO's after-sales service network. realme users' existing after-sales rights will largely remain unchanged, and they will simultaneously enjoy upgraded, higher-quality services. 昨天，真我手机宣布，自今天起，realme 将全面接入 OPPO 售后服务网络，realme 用户原有售后权益基本保持不变，并将同步享受更优质的服务升级。

The official statement indicates that relying on OPPO's nearly one thousand official service centers nationwide, realme users can enjoy convenient after-sales support nearby. Stores offer face-to-face professional repairs, with certified engineers performing operations, ensuring higher quality repairs. 官方表示，依托 OPPO 全国近千家官方服务中心，realme 用户可就近享受便捷售后支持，门店提供面对面专业维修，工程师持证操作，维修品质更有保障。

item.title: 千问测试「引证」功能，AI 回答支持信源核查
item.guid: 千问测试「引证」功能，AI-回答支持信源核查
item.description:
Qianwen recently launched a new feature called "Citation," which allows for secondary fact-checking of answers that involve news, current affairs, policy dynamics, and other content requiring external sources. This feature is currently still in its testing phase. 千问近日上线了一项名为「引证」的新功能，可对涉及新闻时事、政策动态等需引用外部信源的回答内容进行二次事实核查。目前该功能仍处于测试阶段。

In actual use, the "Citation" button only appears at the end of an answer when the user's question involves content related to news, current affairs, policy dynamics, or other information requiring reference to online sources. 实际体验中，「引证」按钮仅在用户提问涉及新闻时事、政策动态等需参考网络信息的内容时，才会出现在回答末尾。

After clicking, the system will automatically enter verification mode, intelligently marking key information in the answer: content supported by reliable, cross-verifiable authoritative sources will be highlighted in green; content with ambiguous or contradictory sources, or not yet confirmed by mainstream media, will be marked in red with a prompt "requires further verification." 点击后，系统将自动进入核查模式，对回答中的关键信息进行智能标注：有可靠、可交叉验证的权威信源支持的内容以绿色高亮显示；信息来源模糊、存在矛盾，或尚未被主流媒体证实的内容则标记为红色，并提示「需进一步核查」。

item.title: 长安汽车获批 L4 Robotaxi 测试牌照
item.guid: 长安汽车获批-L4-Robotaxi-测试牌照
item.description:
Yesterday, Changan Automobile officially announced that it has been formally approved for an L4-level Robotaxi test license. After a unanimous joint review by six departments of the Yongchuan District Intelligent Connected Vehicle Policy Pilot Zone in Chongqing, Changan Automobile has become one of the first domestic automakers to possess full compliance and full-scenario L4-level autonomous driving test qualifications. 昨天，长安汽车官宣，正式获批 L4 级 Robotaxi 测试牌照。经重庆市永川区智能网联汽车政策先行区六部门联合审议全票通过，长安汽车成为国内首批拥有全合规、全场景 L4 级无人驾驶实测资格的车企。

On the technical roadmap, Changan Automobile's L4-level Robotaxi is based on its Tianzhu intelligent "end-to-end homologous" architecture, achieving high reusability of underlying algorithms with mass-produced L2 and L3 models, and its training data covers complex scenarios such as urban commuting, expressways, congested road sections, and severe weather. 在技术路线上，长安汽车 L4 级 Robotaxi 基于旗下天枢智能「端到端同源」架构，与量产 L2、L3 车型实现底层算法高度复用，训练数据覆盖城市通勤、高速干线、拥堵路段及恶劣天气等复杂场景。

item.title: 华为去年营收 8809 亿，智能汽车业务暴增 72%
item.guid: 华为去年营收-8809-亿，智能汽车业务暴增-72%
item.description:
Yesterday, Huawei released its 2025 annual report, disclosing key operating data and business progress for the full year. 昨天，华为发布 2025 年年度报告，披露全年核心经营数据与业务进展。

    Sales revenue reached 880.9 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 2.2%, with net profit reaching 68 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 8.7%;

    Cash flow from operating activities surged by 44.1% year-on-year, reaching 127.4 billion yuan, a new five-year high;

    R&D expenditure was 192.3 billion yuan, accounting for approximately 21.8% of the annual revenue, with cumulative R&D investment over the past decade exceeding 1.38 trillion yuan.

The performance of various business segments showed clear differentiation, with the intelligent automotive solutions business leading with a year-on-year increase of 72.1%, digital energy business growing by 12.7%, ICT infrastructure and terminal businesses remaining stable, and cloud computing business experiencing a slight decline of 3.5%. 各业务板块表现分化明显，智能汽车解决方案业务以 72.1% 的同比增幅领跑，数字能源业务增长 12.7%，ICT 基础设施与终端业务保持稳健，云计算业务则小幅下滑 3.5%。

    Harmony Ecosystem : As of the end of last year, terminal devices equipped with HarmonyOS 5 and HarmonyOS 6 exceeded 36 million units, registered developers surpassed 10 million, and the app market offered over 350,000 applications and services;

    AI Computing Power : Ascend 384 supernodes have been widely serving industries such as internet, finance, and telecommunications operators, with over 4 million Ascend developers, over 3.8 million Kunpeng developers, and a total of over 9,800 partners;

    Digital Energy : Global shipments of inverter equipment reached approximately 185 GW, cumulatively helping customers produce over 2 trillion kWh of green electricity and reduce carbon dioxide emissions by approximately 1.06 billion tons.

Rotating Chairman Meng Wanzhou, in her annual report address, characterized artificial intelligence as "the last technological revolution in human history" and explicitly stated that Huawei will adhere to "hardware as the primary profit model," strategically focusing on "cluster + supernode" scale computing power, and continuously promoting the "ubiquity" of Kunpeng and Ascend. 轮值董事长孟晚舟在年报致辞中将人工智能定性为「人类历史上最后一场技术变革」，并明确表示华为将坚持「以硬件为主要盈利模式」，战略聚焦「集群 + 超节点」规模算力，持续推动鲲鹏昇腾「无处不在」。

In addition, Huawei announced last night that, according to the company's rotating chairman system, Wang Tao will serve as the rotating chairman from April 1 to September 30, 2026, presiding over the company's board of directors and its standing committee. 此外，华为昨晚发布公告称，根据公司轮值董事长制度，汪涛将在 2026 年 4 月 1 日 ~ 9 月 30 日期间，当值轮值董事长，主持公司董事会及董事会常务委员会。

item.title: 智谱交出上市首份年度成绩单
item.guid: 智谱交出上市首份年度成绩单
item.description:
Zhipu released its first annual performance announcement since its listing yesterday. 智谱昨日发布上市以来首份年度业绩公告。

For the full year 2025, the company achieved total operating revenue of 724 million RMB, a year-on-year increase of 131.9%; net loss for the year was 4.718 billion RMB, a year-on-year expansion of 59.5%; adjusted net loss was 3.182 billion RMB, a year-on-year expansion of 29.1%; loss per share was 12.03 RMB.

Revenue growth primarily came from three core business lines: open platform and API revenue of 190 million RMB (up 292.6% year-on-year), enterprise-level intelligent agent revenue of 166 million RMB (up 248.8% year-on-year), and enterprise-level general large model revenue of 366 million RMB (up 70.5% year-on-year). 营收增长主要来自三条核心业务线：开放平台及 API 收入 1.90 亿元（同比增长 292.6%），企业级智能体收入 1.66 亿元（同比增长 248.8%），企业级通用大模型收入 3.66 亿元（同比增长 70.5%）。

Gross profit margin decreased from 56.3% last year to 41.0%, which the company attributed in its performance announcement to an increased proportion of cloud-based deployment business and a phased decline in the gross profit margin of localized deployment business. 毛利率则由去年的 56.3% 下降至 41.0%，公司在业绩公告中将此归因于云端部署业务占比提升，以及本地化部署业务毛利率的阶段性下降。

The core driver of the expanded loss is the continuous increase in R&D investment. In 2025, Zhipu's R&D expenditure reached 3.180 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 44.9%, mainly due to rising employee costs and increased computing service fees paid to third-party computing power providers. 亏损扩大的核心驱动因素是持续加码的研发投入。2025 年，智谱研发开支达 31.80 亿元，同比增加 44.9%，主要源于员工成本上升及向第三方算力供应商支付的计算服务费用增加。

On January 8 this year, Zhipu listed on the main board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange at HK$116.20 per share, raising a total of approximately HK$5 billion (including over-allotment). Since its listing, the stock price has risen steadily, with a cumulative increase of nearly five times as of yesterday's close, and a total market capitalization of approximately HK$309.2 billion. 今年 1 月 8 日，智谱以每股 116.20 港元在港交所主板挂牌上市，募集资金总额约 50 亿港元（含超额配售）。上市以来股价一路走高，截至昨日收盘，累计涨幅近五倍，总市值约 3092 亿港元。

item.title: 联想控股去年收入 6060 亿创历史新高
item.guid: 联想控股去年收入-6060-亿创历史新高
item.description:
Yesterday, Legend Holdings released its full-year 2025 performance announcement. 昨天，联想控股发布 2025 年全年业绩公告。

Full-year revenue reached 606 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 18%, breaking the 600 billion yuan mark for the first time and setting a new historical high; net profit was 9.8 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 28%; net profit attributable to equity holders of the company was 1.06 billion yuan, a substantial year-on-year increase of 698%.

The core driving force came from its subsidiary, Lenovo Group. Last year, Lenovo Group's revenue increased by 20% year-on-year to 560.4 billion yuan, with AI-related revenue growing by over 140% year-on-year, now accounting for nearly 30% of Lenovo Group's total revenue. 核心驱动力来自旗下联想集团。去年，联想集团收入同比增长 20% 至 5604 亿元，AI 相关收入同比增速超 140%，已占联想集团收入比重近 30%。

    PC Business : Global market share reached 25.3% in the fourth quarter of last year, making it the first PC manufacturer to exceed 25% market share since statistics began; AI PC achieved triple-digit growth, accounting for over 30% of Lenovo's total PC shipments in the fourth quarter, firmly ranking first globally in the Windows AI PC category;

    Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG) : Revenue increased by 37% year-on-year to 126.2 billion yuan, AI servers achieved triple-digit growth, and fourth-quarter order reserves exceeded 100 billion yuan; Lenovo partnered with Nvidia at CES in January this year to launch new AI inference servers and the "Lenovo AI Cloud Super Factory";

    Solutions and Services Group (SSG) : Revenue increased by 19% year-on-year to 68.7 billion yuan, maintaining double-digit growth for 19 consecutive quarters, with an operating profit margin of over 20%.

item.title: 招行董事长：员工很少准点下班，企业文化是最大护城河
item.guid: 招行董事长：员工很少准点下班，企业文化是最大护城河
item.description:
According to The Paper, China Merchants Bank Chairman Miao Jianmin stated yesterday at the bank's 2025 annual performance press conference that CMB's true "moat" is not its retail business or financial technology, but rather the internalization of the "customer-centric" philosophy into its corporate culture and its transformation into employees' daily behavior. 据澎湃新闻报道，招商银行董事长缪建民昨日在该行 2025 年度业绩发布会上表示，招行真正的「护城河」并非零售业务或金融科技，而是将「以客户为中心」的理念内化为企业文化，并转化为员工日常行为。

Miao Jianmin gave examples of employees' daily behavior: if you go to a CMB branch after 5 PM, you'll find that employees rarely leave on time; after the announcement of the 2025 annual results, colleagues in the board office completed thick analyst and investor communication materials in just two days. 缪建民以员工日常行为举例：下午 5 点后前往招行分支机构，会发现员工很少准点下班；2025 年度业绩公布后，董事会办公室同事仅用两天时间便完成了厚厚的分析师及投资者沟通材料。

This is the company culture, and I think this is the biggest moat. Because whether it's concepts, operations, or technology, they are all driven and operated by people.

He further emphasized that without this culture and cohesion, other moats would eventually collapse. Miao Jianmin stated that this is the fundamental reason why China Merchants Bank has consistently outperformed the market and its peers during downturns in the banking industry. 他进一步强调，若缺乏这种文化与凝聚力，其他护城河终将倒塌。缪建民表示，招行在银行业下行周期中始终能跑赢大市、优于同行，根本原因正在于此。

item.title: 💡 Waymo 联席 CEO：自动驾驶技术终将进入私家车
item.guid: 💡-Waymo-联席-CEO：自动驾驶技术终将进入私家车
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Waymo co-CEO Dmitri Dolgov recently stated in an interview that the company's autonomous driving technology will eventually enter the private passenger car market. 据《商业内幕》报道，Waymo 联席 CEO Dmitri Dolgov 近日在接受采访时表示，该公司的自动驾驶技术最终将进入私人乘用车市场。

Dolgov stated in the interview that Waymo's product lines will move towards "convergence" in the future. Dolgov 在采访中表示，Waymo 旗下的产品线未来将走向「融合」。

Currently, you can hail a ride through the Waymo app, and in the future, this technology will appear in your own car; this is a foreseeable direction.

Dolgov also pointed out that the private car scenario is particularly suitable for deployment in areas with insufficient commercial density. Dolgov 同时指出，私家车场景尤其适合在商业密度不足的地区落地。

Technical issues have been resolved, but if you are in a remote area with infrequent travel needs, it's clearly not cost-effective for Waymo's ride-hailing service to have vehicles on standby there.

item.title: OPPO Find X9 Ultra 定档 4 月 21 日
item.guid: OPPO-Find-X9-Ultra-定档-4-月-21-日
item.description:
Yesterday, OPPO officially announced that it will hold the OPPO x Hasselblad Imaging New Product Joint Launch Event on April 21st at 19:00, releasing two new phones, the annual imaging flagships Find X9 Ultra and Find X9s Pro. 昨天，OPPO 正式宣布将于 4 月 21 日 19:00 举行 OPPO x 哈苏影像新品联合发布会，发布年度影像旗舰 Find X9 Ultra 与 Find X9s Pro 两款新机。

According to leaks, the Find X9 Ultra will feature a 200-megapixel LYT901 main camera (aperture F1.5), while the periscope telephoto will use a 50-megapixel JNL sensor, supporting native 10x optical zoom. 据爆料，Find X9 Ultra 将搭载 2 亿像素 LYT901 主摄（光圈 F1.5），潜望长焦则采用 5000 万像素 JNL 传感器，支持原生 10 倍光学变焦。

OPPO officially revealed that the phone features an industry-first 5-reflection prism design, with an equivalent focal length of up to 460mm, corresponding to 20x optical quality zoom, and supporting up to 120x digital zoom. OPPO 官方透露，该机行业首创 5 反射棱镜设计，等效焦距可达 460mm，对应 20 倍光学品质变焦，至高支持 120 倍数码变焦。

The Find X9s Pro also focuses on imaging, and according to leaks, it will be powered by the MediaTek Dimensity 9500 chip, equipped with a dual 200-megapixel camera system, and a "7K-level" large-capacity battery. Find X9s Pro 同样主打影像，据爆料将搭载联发科天玑 9500 芯片，并配备双 2 亿像素镜头系统、搭载「7K 级」大容量电池。

item.title: 支付宝推出国内首个「支付集成 Skill」
item.guid: 支付宝推出国内首个「支付集成-Skill」
item.description:
Alipay yesterday officially released the first "Payment Integration Skill" in China, encapsulating basic payment capabilities into standardized components and opening them up for use by Vibe Coding developers. 支付宝昨日正式发布国内首个「支付集成 Skill」，将基础支付能力封装为标准化组件，面向 Vibe Coding 开发者开放使用。

Developers can complete the integration in just three steps: download the "Alipay Payment Integration Skill," complete the installation in the development tool, and then describe the collection requirements in natural language, and AI will automatically complete the integration of the payment function, with no need to manually write payment docking code throughout the process. 开发者只需通过三个步骤即可完成接入：下载「支付宝支付集成 Skill」、在开发工具中完成安装，随后以自然语言描述收款需求，AI 便可自动完成支付功能的集成，整个流程无需手动编写支付对接代码。

item.title: TRAE 旗下 AI 协作产品 SOLO 开放内测
item.guid: TRAE-旗下-AI-协作产品-SOLO-开放内测
item.description:
Yesterday, TRAE AI announced that its AI collaboration product SOLO's desktop and web versions are officially open for user beta testing. 昨天，TRAE AI 宣布，旗下 AI 协作产品 SOLO 桌面端与网页端正式开放用户内测。

SOLO adopts a new three-column workspace design, allowing centralized management of project files, real-time visibility of task progress, and integration of various Skills and tools, supporting on-demand invocation. SOLO 采用全新三栏工作区设计，项目文件集中管理、任务进度实时可见，并集成多类 Skills 与工具，支持按需调用。

In terms of agent architecture, SOLO introduces a dual-mode design—General Task Mode (MTC) and Code Development Mode (Code)—to address different scenarios such as writing proposals, performing analysis, and writing code. In Code mode, desktop and web clients can collaborate at any time, and multiple tasks can run in parallel in the background. 在智能体架构上，SOLO 引入双模式设计——通用任务模式（MTC）与代码开发模式（Code），分别面向写方案、做分析和写代码等不同场景。Code 模式下，桌面端与网页端可随时协同，多个任务可同时在后台并行运行。

Regarding file processing capabilities, SOLO supports various formats such as JSON, Python, PPTX, and CSV. All outputs are directly displayed in the tool panel, allowing users to comment and modify at any time for more intuitive results iteration. 文件处理能力方面，SOLO 支持 JSON、Python、PPTX、CSV 等多种格式，所有产出直接在工具面板中展示，用户可随时评论与修改，实现更直观的成果迭代。

item.title: 蚂蚁灵波开源 2.71TB 深度数据集
item.guid: 蚂蚁灵波开源-2.71TB-深度数据集
item.description:
Ant Lingbo Technology yesterday officially open-sourced the large-scale RGB-D depth dataset LingBot-Depth-Dataset, with a total data size of 2.71TB, containing 3 million high-quality samples. It is currently the largest real-world RGB-D dataset in the open-source community. 蚂蚁灵波科技昨日正式开源大规模 RGB-D 深度数据集 LingBot-Depth-Dataset，总数据规模达 2.71TB，包含 300 万对高质量样本，是目前开源社区中规模最大的真实场景 RGB-D 数据集。

It is reported that each sample in this open-source dataset includes RGB images, raw sensor depth maps, and ground truth depth maps, which can be directly used for training and evaluation of depth estimation and depth completion tasks, helping to improve model training, adaptation, and evaluation capabilities across different devices and scenarios. 据悉，此次开源的数据集每条样本均包含 RGB 图像、传感器原始深度图和真值深度图，可直接用于深度估计与深度补全任务的训练和评估，有助于提升模型在不同设备和场景下的训练、适配与评估能力。

item.title: 摩尔线程开源机器人仿真加速方案
item.guid: 摩尔线程开源机器人仿真加速方案
item.description:
Moore Threads yesterday officially open-sourced MuJoCo Warp MUSA, the first full-featured GPU-accelerated physics simulation backend based on the MUSA architecture in the field of embodied intelligence. 摩尔线程昨日正式开源 MuJoCo Warp MUSA，这是具身智能领域首个基于 MUSA 架构的全功能 GPU 加速物理仿真后端。

MuJoCo is a high-precision physics engine maintained by DeepMind, widely integrated into mainstream platforms such as OpenAI Gym and dm_control. Moore Threads has now added native MUSA support, enabling domestic full-featured GPUs to directly participate in robot physics simulation and reinforcement learning training. MuJoCo 是由 DeepMind 维护的高精度物理引擎，已被 OpenAI Gym、dm_control 等主流平台广泛集成。摩尔线程此次为其增加了 MUSA 原生支持，使国产全功能 GPU 得以直接参与机器人物理仿真与强化学习训练。

Official data shows that using Moore Threads' flagship intelligent computing card MTT S5000, in the flat-ground motion control training of Unitree Go2 quadruped robot dogs, a single card processes 4096 simulation environments in just 7 8 seconds, achieving approximately 40 times acceleration compared to multi-core CPUs' 280 300 seconds. Training that originally took weeks can now converge within 1 hour. 官方数据显示，使用摩尔线程旗舰智算卡 MTT S5000，在宇树 Go2 四足机器狗平地运控训练中，单卡处理 4096 个仿真环境仅需 7 8 秒，相较多核 CPU 的 280 300 秒实现约 40 倍加速，原本耗时数周的训练可在 1 小时内收敛。

In the more challenging Unitree G1 humanoid robot motion tracking task, a single card completes imitation learning convergence in approximately 4.8 days; when extended to 32-card distributed training, the convergence speed increases almost linearly, completing the task in as fast as approximately 3.6 hours. 难度更高的宇树 G1 人形机器人动作跟踪任务中，单卡约 4.8 天完成模仿学习收敛；扩展至 32 卡分布式训练时，收敛速度接近线性提升，最快约 3.6 小时即可完成。

💻 GitHub: https://github.com/MooreThreads/mujoco _warp_musa 💻 GitHub: https://github.com/MooreThreads/mujoco _warp_musa

item.title: B 站下线「猜你喜欢」算法、上线新算法
item.guid: B-站下线「猜你喜欢」算法、上线新算法
item.description:
Bilibili announced that starting from midnight today, the 'Guess You Like' algorithm will be officially taken offline. The platform will no longer recommend homepage content based on users' historical behavior and personal preferences, and a brand new recommendation algorithm will be launched simultaneously. B 站宣布今天零点起正式下线「猜你喜欢」算法，届时平台将不再根据用户的历史行为和个人喜好来推荐主页内容，同时上线全新的推荐算法。

It is worth noting that Bilibili's official account subsequently posted an article further explaining the details of this change: 值得注意的是，B 站官方随后还发文进一步解释了本次变化的细节：

At that time, it will no longer only recommend content from 'Guess You Like'; you can also choose to switch to content from 'Guess Others Like'.

The new feature is available for a limited time of 24 hours, possibly an April Fool's Easter egg . 新功能限时上线 24 小时，或为愚人节彩蛋 。

item.title: 一网店推「地球使用费」：退货运费不退还
item.guid: 一网店推「地球使用费」：退货运费不退还
item.description:
Outdoor brand Patagonia's Tmall flagship store recently announced the launch of a 'Earth Usage Fee' mechanism, charging separate packaging and logistics fees for each order. The first item incurs a 15 yuan shipping fee, with an additional 5 yuan for each subsequent item. The official explanation is summarized as follows: 户外品牌 Patagonia 天猫旗舰店近日宣布推出「地球使用费」机制，对每笔订单单独收取包装及物流费用，首件商品收取 15 元运费，每增加一件加收 5 元。官方说明概括如下：

If the consumer finally confirms receipt and does not return or exchange the goods, this shipping fee will be refunded to the original payment method within 24 hours; if a return or exchange occurs, the shipping fee will not be refunded and will be fully donated to the '1% for the Planet' environmental public welfare project under the SEE Foundation.

It is worth noting that the store also stated that it does not offer shipping insurance. If a return or exchange is requested due to personal reasons (such as size, color, dislike, etc.), the shipping costs must be borne by the consumer. 值得注意的是，该店同时声明不开通运费险，若因个人原因（尺码、颜色、不喜欢等）申请退换货，运费须由消费者自行承担。

item.title: 名创优品 2025 年报：收入增三成，TOP TOY 出海加速
item.guid: 名创优品-2025-年报：收入增三成，TOP-TOY-出海加速
item.description:
Yesterday, MINISO released its 2025 annual performance report: 昨天，名创优品发布 2025 年度业绩：

Total annual revenue reached RMB 21.444 billion, a year-on-year increase of 26.2%; adjusted net profit was RMB 2.898 billion, a year-on-year increase of 6.5%.

Dragged down by the losses of Yonghui Superstores, the group's net profit for the year, calculated according to International Financial Reporting Standards, significantly declined to RMB 1.210 billion, a decrease of approximately 54% compared to RMB 2.635 billion in the same period last year. This was primarily due to MINISO's acquisition of approximately 29.4% equity in Yonghui in the first quarter of this year. 受永辉超市亏损拖累，集团按国际财务报告准则计算的年内净利润大幅下滑至人民币 12.10 亿元，较上年同期的人民币 26.35 亿元减少约 54%，主要源于名创优品于今年第一季度完成对永辉约 29.4% 股权的收购。

In terms of store expansion, as of the end of last year, the total number of MINISO brand stores worldwide reached 8151, with 4568 in mainland China and 3583 overseas, a net increase of 647 stores compared to the end of 2024. 门店扩张方面，截至去年底，名创优品品牌全球门店总数达 8151 家，其中中国内地 4568 家，海外 3583 家，较 2024 年底净增 647 家。

TOP TOY stores increased to 334, with 30 located in overseas markets. This marks TOP TOY's first large-scale overseas expansion since launching its globalization strategy in Q4 2024. TOP TOY 门店增至 334 家，其中 30 家位于海外市场，这是 TOP TOY 自 2024 年四季度启动全球化以来的首次大规模海外布局。

Regarding members, MINISO's cumulative membership in mainland China exceeded 112 million, an increase of 17.8% year-on-year; cumulative membership in the US market grew particularly significantly, up 150.3% year-on-year to approximately 4.4 million. 会员方面，中国内地名创优品累计会员总数突破 1.12 亿人，较上年增长 17.8%；美国市场累计会员数增长尤为突出，同比增长 150.3%，达约 440 万人。

item.title: 鸣鸣很忙交出首份年报，收入 661 亿元、县城门店占六成
item.guid: 鸣鸣很忙交出首份年报，收入-661-亿元、县城门店占六成
item.description:
Yesterday, the bulk snack chain Mingming Hen Mang Group released its 2025 annual performance report, with full-year revenue exceeding 66.1 billion yuan and net profit growing by nearly 181% year-on-year. 昨天，量贩零食连锁鸣鸣很忙集团公布 2025 年度业绩报告，全年收入突破 661 亿元，净利润同比增长近 181%。

    Net profit of 2.33 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 180.9%;

    Gross profit margin increased from 7.6% to 9.8%, with gross profit reaching 6.51 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 116.9%;

    The total number of stores increased from 14,394 at the end of 2024 to 21,948, with about 60% of stores located in county towns and townships, and county town coverage reaching approximately 75%;

The group's two brands, "Ling Shi Hen Mang" and "Zhao Yiming Ling Shi," continue to maintain a complementary layout, primarily operating under a franchise model (franchise stores account for 99.9%). The group plans to continue to deeply cultivate the sinking markets in the future and promote the construction of digital capabilities such as AI scheduling and intelligent replenishment. 集团旗下「零食很忙」与「趙一鸣零食」双品牌继续保持互补布局，以加盟模式为主（加盟店占比 99.9%）。集团计划未来持续深耕下沉市场，并推进 AI 调度、智能补货等数字化能力建设。

item.title: 《AI 纪录片》在美上映：Altman、Amodei、Hassabis 齐聚
item.guid: 《AI-纪录片》在美上映：Altman、Amodei、Hassabis-齐聚
item.description:
According to Business Insider, the AI documentary "The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist," co-directed by Oscar-winning director Daniel Roher and Charlie Tyrell, premiered in US theaters yesterday (March 27). 据《商业内幕》报道，由奥斯卡获奖导演 Daniel Roher 与 Charlie Tyrell 联合执导的 AI 纪录片《The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist》（AI 纪录片：或我如何学会与末日共存）已于昨日（3 月 27 日）登陆美国院线。

For its lineup of interviewees, the film invited key figures in the AI field such as OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei, and Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis, as well as several AI ethics and risk experts. Elon Musk was originally invited but, according to the director, he was "too busy" and ultimately could not appear. 在受访者阵容上，影片邀请到了 OpenAI CEO Sam Altman、Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei、Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis 等 AI 领域核心人物，还有多位 AI 伦理与风险专家。马斯克原本也在受邀之列，但据导演透露，他「太忙了」，最终未能出镜。

The film delves into the current state, potential, and risks of AI technology from Roher's personal perspective as an expectant father. The term "apocaloptimist" runs throughout the film, reflecting the creators' complex emotions towards the AI era—both full of apprehension and anticipation. 影片以 Roher 即将为人父的个人视角切入，试图厘清 AI 技术的现状、潜力与风险。「apocaloptimist」（末日乐观主义者）一词贯穿全片，折射出创作者对 AI 时代的复杂情绪——既充满忧虑，又抱有期待。

The film also directly addresses the business logic behind the AI race. Altman admits in the film that, under similar conditions, the party willing to take shortcuts on safety often gains an advantage, but he also states that OpenAI is leveraging its leading position to invest more time in safety testing. 影片也直面了 AI 竞赛背后的商业逻辑。Altman 在片中坦承，在同等条件下，愿意在安全上走捷径的一方往往能抢占先机，但他同时表示 OpenAI 正利用自身的领先优势投入更多时间进行安全测试。

Despite the film's pervasive underlying concern about AI losing control, Altman still expresses personal optimism for the future: "I'm not worried about children growing up in a world with AI." The film concludes with Roher's private footage of welcoming his newborn, bringing the grand technological theme back to an ordinary father's hopes for the future. 尽管影片弥漫着对 AI 失控的隐忧，Altman 仍对未来表达了个人层面的乐观：「我不担心孩子们在一个有 AI 的世界里成长。」影片最终以 Roher 迎接新生儿的私人影像作结，将宏大的技术命题落回到一个普通父亲对未来的期许之上。

The film currently holds an 89% "Fresh" rating on Rotten Tomatoes (based on 35 critics) and a Metacritic score of 60, indicating "mixed or average reviews." 影片目前在烂番茄上获得 89% 的新鲜度（基于 35 位影评人），Metacritic 综合评分为 60 分，评价呈「褒贬不一」态势。

item.title: 《消失的人》官宣定档五一
item.guid: 《消失的人》官宣定档五一
item.description:
Yesterday, the film "The Vanished" officially announced its release date for May Day, simultaneously releasing the "Someone Inside" teaser trailer and the "Mystery in the Building" release poster. 昨天，电影《消失的人》官宣定档五一，并同步发布「屋内有人」版定档预告及「楼中谜」版定档海报。

The film is written and directed by Cheng Weihao, starring Zheng Kai and Liu Haocun, with Roy Chiu as a special guest star. The story focuses on an ordinary residential building where the peaceful lives of residents like Tang Yu (played by Zheng Kai), Lin Yutong (played by Liu Haocun), and Yan Wu (played by Roy Chiu) are disrupted by a series of bizarre events. 影片由程伟豪编剧并执导，郑恺、刘浩存领衔主演，邱泽特别主演。故事聚焦于一栋普通居民楼，唐宇（郑恺 饰）、林雨彤（刘浩存 饰）、严午（邱泽 饰）等住户的平静生活被一系列离奇事件打破。
